phases.name: SDK source/module rename
phases.goal: Move the babysitter plugin SDK module to blueprints, update exported types/interfaces/constants, and preserve compatibility only where the spec requires it.
phases.verificationCommand: npm run build:sdk && npm run test --workspace=@a5c-ai/babysitter-sdk -- src/blueprints src/index.ts

phases.name: CLI blueprints commands and deprecated aliases
phases.goal: Add the blueprints CLI command surface, keep old plugin command aliases with deprecation warnings, update argument parsing/usage, and reconcile the issue's plural examples with the current singular plugin:* command family.
phases.verificationCommand: npm run build:sdk && npm run test --workspace=@a5c-ai/babysitter-sdk -- src/cli/commands/__tests__/plugin-registry.test.ts src/cli/commands/__tests__/plugin-lifecycle.test.ts src/cli/commands/__tests__/plugin-marketplace.test.ts src/cli/commands/__tests__/plugin-handlers.test.ts src/cli/__tests__/cliRuns.test.ts && npm run check:plugin-commands

phases.name: Marketplace and config path migration
phases.goal: Move babysitter marketplace installables from plugins to blueprints, read both old and new config paths for compatibility, add BABYSITTER_BLUEPRINT_* support, and keep agent plugin env vars unchanged.
phases.verificationCommand: npm run build:sdk && npm run test --workspace=@a5c-ai/babysitter-sdk -- src/blueprints/__tests__/marketplace.test.ts src/blueprints/__tests__/integration/plugin-flows.test.ts src/cli/commands/__tests__/plugin-lifecycle.test.ts && npm run verify:metadata

phases.name: Docs, skills, and process-library terminology
phases.goal: Split/update docs for babysitter blueprints while preserving agent plugin docs, rename the babysitter plugins skill/command surface to blueprints, and update process-library references without touching agent plugin internals.
phases.testCommand: npm run docs:snippets && npm run docs:links && npm run check:sdk-command-templates
phases.verificationCommand: npm run docs:snippets && npm run docs:links && npm run check:sdk-command-templates && npm run check:plugin-commands

finalVerificationCommands: changed="$(git diff --name-only origin/staging...HEAD 2>/dev/null || git diff --name-only)"; echo "$changed" | rg '^(packages/(extension-mux|hooks-mux)/|\.claude/plugins/)' && exit 1 || true
explicitNonGoals: Do not rename or alter hooks-mux or extension-mux agent plugin concepts.
Do not rename CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT, PI_PLUGIN_ROOT, or .claude/plugins.
Do not remove deprecated plugin CLI aliases in this change.
